data.body: Pass-1 llm-prompts overlay: reviewed the addition of `owner: code-review-guild` to code-review-tests.md front-matter. CLEAN — no findings. The parser (`prompts_frontmatter.py`) explicitly WARN+PRESERVEs unknown front-matter keys rather than dropping/rejecting them ("Unknown keys are WARN+PRESERVEd, not dropped"), so this is a backward-compatible optional-field addition. The parsed contract (`outputs: code_review_findings`, `dimension`, `langfuse_prompt`, etc.) is unchanged; no consumer branches on `owner`.
